stemHtml: What is the principle of operation of an Air Data Computer (ADC)?

options.a: Input of pitot/static and temperature data, conversion to digital/electronic signals, correction of data, transmission to the instrument.
options.b: Input of pitot/static and temperature data, application of corrections, transmission through tubes to the instrument.
options.c: Receipt of electrical/digital input, transmission of pressure to the systems.
options.d: Receipt of electrical/digital input, transmission to the instruments.
